pi_items.source: task.json description line 5 states: 'Achieve 80% code coverage on new modules'. Metadata is missing the phrase 'on new modules'. This is an incomplete/truncated requirement.
task.json description line 5 explicitly requires 'at least 4 configured widgets'; confirmed in README.md scoring table showing 4 distinct widget types to configure

privileged_info_summary: The TailwindTraders project with 15 work items (8 in Sprint 1: 2 user stories, 3 Priority 1 bugs, 3 tasks) is established in the environment. The task requires creating a dashboard with at least 4 widgets including: (1) Markdown widget with goals text, (2) Query Tile for 'Active Bugs', (3) Chart for 'Sprint 1 All Items' grouped by State, (4) one additional widget. A metadata discrepancy exists: the markdown requirement states 'Achieve 80% code coverage on new modules' in the task description but the metadata list only specifies 'Achieve 80% code coverage' without 'on new modules'. The required shared queries 'Active Bugs' and 'Sprint 1 All Items' are referenced as existing but are not created by the environment setup scripts.
